# The Choice: Moral Dilemma Game

> Official website and interactive narrative project by Alex Shlykov.

## Project
- Name: The Choice
- URL: https://thechoice.quest/
- Type: Interactive narrative game about ethics and moral philosophy
- Language: Multilingual (UI and story content)

## What this site is about
The Choice is a short, replayable story game where players make decisions in moral dilemmas and compare ethical frameworks such as utilitarianism and deontology.

## Primary pages
- https://thechoice.quest/

- Repository: https://github.com/AlekseiShlykov/the-choice2
